name: Stripe
summary: Look up customers, subscriptions, invoices, and refunds in Stripe (read-first).
description: Query Stripe for customers, payments, subscriptions, invoices, and search Stripe docs. For a product/company control center, revenue + billing is core signal. Uses Stripe's official MCP server (remote OAuth at mcp.stripe.com, or a local toolkit with a Restricted API Key).

requires.label: A Stripe Restricted API Key (rk_*, read-only to start) -- or OAuth to the remote server
